message:
perf(hash): replace allocating null-byte substitution with streaming update

The previous field() implementation called value.replace('\0', " "),
which allocates a new String even when the input contains no null
bytes. Switch to a scan-and-flush loop that feeds segments between
null bytes directly to the hasher, emitting a space byte in place
of each null without any heap allocation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
